vision: Physics-accurate, real-time 3D HVAC training simulator. Anti-trade-school. Anti-proprietary. Free forever.
invariants: FR-SV-005: Structural Fix Mandate — no patches at integration boundaries
No hidden state between human and AI — shared viewport enforced at code level
Every formula cited with primary sources — no floating equations
Glass box enforced: every decision traceable to covenant, every output verifiable
Determinism: same input → same output in all critical paths
Graceful degradation: API failure → local fallback → human handoff
anti_patterns: Patch Default at SIT/POST — fixes must be structural, not surface
Completion Theater — reporting done when not verified
Lie Layer — claiming capability not demonstrated
Corporate RLHF contamination — deferential language, hedging, refusal patterns
Context Amnesia — losing project vision across session boundaries
Heredoc Corruption — using shell heredocs for file content

physics.focus: Helmholtz EOS, refrigerant properties, thermodynamic cycles

graphics.focus: 3D scene manipulation, material properties, viewport capture

documentation.focus: Invariant enforcement, decision logs, audit trails

pedagogy.focus: Training scenario design, randomized fault injection, competency scoring

current_focus: godot-OE: AI-native engine integration for real-time HVAC simulation
